# @zakkster/lite-headless/toggle-group

Headless segmented control / toggle group with WAI-ARIA semantics.
Two modes:

- **`single`** ŌĆö exclusive selection (like a radio group, but
  rendered as buttons with `aria-pressed` ŌĆö the segmented-control
  pattern, e.g., a view-mode selector: List / Grid / Card).
- **`multi`** ŌĆö independent toggles (each item has its own
  `aria-pressed`, e.g., text-formatting buttons: B / I / U / S).

## Quick example ŌĆö single mode

```js
import { createToggleGroup } from "@zakkster/lite-headless/toggle-group";

const tg = createToggleGroup({
    type: "single",
    defaultValue: "list",
    onValueChange: (value, reason) => setView(value),
});

tg.attachRoot(groupEl);     // role=group + data-orientation
tg.attachItem(btnList, "list");
tg.attachItem(btnGrid, "grid");
tg.attachItem(btnCard, "card");
```

## Quick example ŌĆö multi mode

```js
const tg = createToggleGroup({
    type: "multi",
    defaultValue: ["bold"],
    onValueChange: (value, reason) => applyStyles(value),  // value is string[]
});

tg.attachItem(btnB, "bold");
tg.attachItem(btnI, "italic");
tg.attachItem(btnU, "underline");
```

## Options

| Option           | Default        | Notes                                                    |
| ---------------- | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------- |
| `type`           | `"single"`     | `"single"` or `"multi"`                                  |
| `defaultValue`   | -              | `string` (single) or `string[]` (multi)                  |
| `value`          | -              | Signal for controlled mode (read-only)                   |
| `disabled`       | `false`        | Group-wide disabled                                      |
| `loop`           | `true`         | Arrow nav wraps at edges                                 |
| `allowDeselect`  | `false`        | Single mode: clicking current deselects? Multi always allows |
| `orientation`    | `"horizontal"` | Arrow nav uses ŌåÉ/ŌåÆ (horizontal) or Ōåæ/Ōåō (vertical)        |
| `onValueChange`  | -              | `(value, reason) => void`                                |

`reason` values: `"click"`, `"keyboard"`, `"set"`, `"imperative"`,
`"item-disabled"` (when an item is disabled while selected),
`"attribute"` (from the wrapper's attribute observer).

## Differences from `radio-group` / `tabs`

- **Buttons with `aria-pressed`**, not `role="radio"`. The
  segmented-control pattern is a "group of toggle buttons", not a
  radio group. Screen readers announce "toggle button pressed" /
  "not pressed" rather than "selected" / "unselected".
- **Manual activation only**. Focus does NOT select. This matches
  the toolbar APG pattern: users can arrow through items without
  selecting them, then explicitly toggle with Space / Enter or
  click. In contrast, tabs (with `activation: "automatic"`) and
  radio groups select on focus.
- **Multi mode**. Tabs and radio groups are exclusive-only; toggle
  group supports both single AND multi-selection.

## Keyboard

| Key                         | Action                                                    |
| --------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------- |
| ArrowRight (horizontal) / ArrowDown (vertical) | Move focus to next item (loops if `loop=true`) |
| ArrowLeft / ArrowUp         | Move focus to previous item                               |
| Home                        | Move focus to first item                                  |
| End                         | Move focus to last item                                   |
| Space, Enter                | Toggle/select the focused item                            |

Disabled items are skipped during arrow navigation.

## ARIA

| Element | Attributes                                                          |
| ------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Root    | `role="group"`, `data-orientation`, consumer-provided `aria-label`  |
| Item    | `aria-pressed="true|false"`, `data-X="on|off"`, `aria-disabled`, `data-disabled`, `data-focused` (when focus is on it), real `disabled` (when target is `<button>`), `tabindex` (roving: 0 on focused, -1 on rest) |

The wrapper does NOT set `aria-label` on the root automatically.
The consumer is expected to provide one via `aria-label="View mode"`
on the host, or via `aria-labelledby` pointing to an external
label element. This avoids inventing generic labels that hurt a11y.

## Attachment methods

| Method                       | Effect                                          |
| ---------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| `attachRoot(el)`             | role=group, data-orientation                    |
| `attachItem(el, key, opts?)` | Wires click + keyboard listeners + ARIA paint   |

`opts.disabled: boolean` on `attachItem` marks the item disabled
from the start. The first non-disabled item gets `tabindex="0"`
automatically so the group is keyboard-reachable from a fresh Tab.

## Imperative API

```js
tg.value()                       // string | string[] (depending on type)
tg.disabled()
tg.contains(key)                 // works for both modes
tg.items()                       // [{ key, disabled }, ...]
tg.type                          // "single" | "multi"
tg.orientation                   // "horizontal" | "vertical"

tg.setValue(v, reason?)          // v is string (single) or string[] (multi)
tg.toggleItem(key, reason?)
tg.setDisabled(flag)             // group-wide
tg.setItemDisabled(key, flag)    // per-item; removes from selection if it was selected

tg.destroy()
```

## Custom element wrapper

```html
<!-- single mode -->
<lite-toggle-group aria-label="View mode" value="grid">
    <button data-tg-item="list">List</button>
    <button data-tg-item="grid">Grid</button>
    <button data-tg-item="card">Card</button>
</lite-toggle-group>

<!-- multi mode (comma-separated value attribute) -->
<lite-toggle-group type="multi" value="bold,italic" aria-label="Text formatting">
    <button data-tg-item="bold">B</button>
    <button data-tg-item="italic">I</button>
    <button data-tg-item="underline">U</button>
    <button data-tg-item="strike">S</button>
</lite-toggle-group>
```

### Attributes

| Attribute        | Effect                                                  |
| ---------------- | ------------------------------------------------------- |
| `type`           | `"single"` (default) or `"multi"`                       |
| `value`          | Reactive: string or comma-separated keys                |
| `disabled`       | Reactive: group-wide disable                            |
| `orientation`    | `"horizontal"` (default) or `"vertical"`                |
| `loop`           | `"false"` disables wrap-around (default true)           |
| `allow-deselect` | Single mode: clicking current item deselects            |

### Imperative API on host

```js
host.setValue(v, reason?)
host.toggleItem(key, reason?)
host.contains(key)
host.setDisabled(flag)
host.setItemDisabled(key, flag)
host.value        // read-only
host.disabled     // read-only
host.type         // read-only
```

### Dispatched events

- `change` ŌĆö `{ detail: { value, reason } }`

## CSS contract

```css
lite-toggle-group {
    display: inline-flex;
    border: 1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius: 6px;
    padding: 2px;
    background: var(--bg-2);
}
lite-toggle-group[data-orientation="vertical"] {
    flex-direction: column;
}
lite-toggle-group [data-tg-item] {
    background: transparent; border: none;
    padding: 6px 12px;
    color: var(--text-dim);
}
lite-toggle-group [data-tg-item]:hover:not([aria-pressed="true"]):not([data-disabled]) {
    background: var(--bg-3);
}
lite-toggle-group [data-tg-item][aria-pressed="true"] {
    background: var(--cyan-dim);
    color: #fff;
}
lite-toggle-group [data-tg-item][data-disabled] {
    opacity: 0.4;
    cursor: not-allowed;
}
```

## When to use what

| Need                              | Use                                          |
| --------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| Single-select buttons (view mode) | `toggle-group type="single"`                 |
| Multi-select buttons (formatting) | `toggle-group type="multi"`                  |
| Radio-button form input           | `<input type="radio">` (native, with `name`) |
| Tabs with associated panels       | `tabs` primitive                             |
| Single boolean toggle             | `switch` primitive                           |
| Single command button             | `<button>` (native)                          |
